BodyPosition.text: If the back of the head took the fatal blow,{p:150} the body should be...

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {flash}{playSound:damage2}{sprite:Gumshoe["Determined"]}{startBGM:investigation}{blip:1}This is the murder scene,{p:150} pal.{nl}It's dark because we're past closing.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: Mr. Sahwit,{p:150} the one who found the body,{p:150} was standing right here.{nl}On the first floor of the event hall,{p:150} pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{bgMove:top}{p:500}{showTextbox}See up there?{p:200} The upper levels form an atrium.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: The victim,{p:150} Ms. Nakaki,{p:150} was reportedly up there on the 4th floor railing,{p:150} pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(That's a long drop...{p:200} but I can still see it clearly from here.)

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {color:white}{hideTextbox}{bgMove:bottom}{p:100}{showTextbox}{blip:1}The current theory is that Maggey pushed her from up there...{nl}and she landed right beneath this railing,{p:150} pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead2"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter}{p:200}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}And this is just my read on it,{p:150} pal,{p:150} but...{nl}time of death and discovery might be the same.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {blip:1}The victim fell from the event hall's 4th floor...{nl}and landed right in front of the man who found her,{p:150} pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: Cause of death was blunt-force trauma to the back of the head from the fall,{p:150} A fatal contusion...{nl}Looks like death was instant,{p:150} right here,{p:150} pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {blip:1,false}I see...{nl}All right. Time to start the investigation.{setState:Crime_Scene_Intro_done,true}{sectionEnd}

Examine_Body.name: Phoenix
Examine_Body.text: {color:white}{hideCharacter}{blip:1,false}She died still wearing the Steel Samurai suit and mask...

Examine_Body.name: Phoenix
Examine_Body.text: Huh...{p:200}?{flash}{playSound:question1} The victim died from a severe blow to the back of the head,{p:150} right?

Examine_Body.name: Phoenix
Examine_Body.text: {blip:0,false}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:1,false}Right now,{p:150} the body is lying face down.

Examine_Body.name: Phoenix
Examine_Body.text: But then,{p:150} logically,{p:150} a body with that kind of injury should be...{jump:Body_Lying_Question}{sectionEnd}

Body_Lying_Face_Down.name: Phoenix
Body_Lying_Face_Down.text: {showCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(No...{p:200} that doesn't line up if the back of her head took the blow.){jump:Body_Lying_Question}

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Phoenix
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {color:white}{showCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:1,false}Then she should be lying face-up,{p:150} shouldn't she?

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Gumshoe
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{flash}{playSound:cling}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:1,true}{showTextbox}Ah...{nl}Now that you mention it,{p:150} that's true,{p:150} pal.

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Gumshoe
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["Thinking"]}But weirdly enough,{p:150} she's got cuts and bruises on her face too,{p:150} not just the back of her head,{p:150} pal.

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Phoenix
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}{playSound:question1}(So she has injuries on both the back of the head and the face...)

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Gumshoe
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {color:white}{blip:1,true}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}That blood on the floor's seeping out through the gaps in the mask,{p:150} pal.

Examine_Background.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Background.text: {color:white}{hideCharacter}{blip:1}We checked every floor and even the ceiling,{p:150} pal.{nl}No traps. No gimmicks.

Examine_Out.name: Phoenix
Examine_Out.text: {hideCharacter}{color:white}{blip:1,false}Were there any regular guests around at the time?

Examine_Out.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Out.text: {blip:1,true}There weren't any,{p:150} pal.{nl}This place closes at 9 PM.

Examine_Out.name: Phoenix
Examine_Out.text: {blip:1,false}So,{p:150} at the time of the incident,{p:150} it was just the first witness,{p:150} the victim,{p:150} and the suspect?

Examine_Out.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Out.text: {blip:0,true}That's right,{p:150} pal.{nl}And the only security guard on duty was Maggey.

Examine_Out.name: Phoenix
Examine_Out.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Then there are no outside witnesses to question...)

Examine_Floor.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Floor.text: {blip:1,true}{color:white}{hideCharacter}{blip:1}She died still wearing the Steel Samurai suit and mask...

Examine_Floor.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Floor.text: We've confirmed nothing else fell down with the body,{p:150} pal.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Sahwit
Sahwit_Appears.text: {color:white}{hideTextbox}{blip:1,true}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{stopBGM}{sprite:Sahwit["Stand"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:1000}{startBGM:grossberg,true}{p:1000}{showTextbox}Oh,{flash}{playSound:cling} conducting your crime scene investigation?{nl}Thank you for your hard work.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Gumshoe
Sahwit_Appears.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{showTextbox}Mr. Sahwit.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Sahwit
Sahwit_Appears.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Sahwit["Stand"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{showTextbox}Coming back here still hurts...{nl}As the chief,{p:150} this is truly heartbreaking.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Sahwit
Sahwit_Appears.text: {sprite:Sahwit["Nervous"]}How can I put this...{nl}Just remembering that moment makes my hair stand on end.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Sahwit
Sahwit_Appears.text: Even now,{p:150} every hair on my body is standing straight up...

Sahwit_Appears.name: Gumshoe
Sahwit_Appears.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Gumshoe["Confident"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{showTextbox}Mr. Sahwit...{nl}Your hair isn't standing up at all,{p:150} pal.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Sahwit
Sahwit_Appears.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Sahwit["Nervous"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{p:300}{sprite:Sahwit["Damage"]}{flash}{showTextbox}What?{p:200}!{skip:100}

Sahwit_Appears.name: Sahwit
Sahwit_Appears.text: {sprite:Sahwit["Nervous"]}{showTextbox}W-well...{nl}Standing on end is just a figure of speech.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Sahwit_Appears.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Detective Gumshoe...{nl}Is he implying Mr. Sahwit wears a toupee?)

Sahwit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Sahwit_Appears.text: {color:lightblue}(I mean...{p:200} a toupee probably wouldn't stand on end.)

Sahwit_Appears.name: Sahwit
Sahwit_Appears.text: {blip:1,true}{color:white}{sprite:Sahwit["Stand"]}Putting that aside...{nl}I hope this case is resolved quickly.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Sahwit
Sahwit_Appears.text: I pray for the victim's soul...{nl}Well then.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Sahwit_Appears.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter:1000}{stopBGM}{p:1400}{showEvidenceIcon:right,accessory}{playSound:question1}{blip:1,false}{showTextbox}Huh...{p:200}?{nl}There's something on the floor.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Sahwit_Appears.text: What's this?{nl}Looks like some kind of accessory.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Gumshoe
Sahwit_Appears.text: {hideTextbox}{hideEvidenceIcon}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Gumshoe["Thinking"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{blip:1,true}{showTextbox}You're right,{p:150} pal.{p:200}{nl}That wasn't there a minute ago...

Sahwit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Sahwit_Appears.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(I'll hold onto this as evidence for now.)
{addEvidence:accessory,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}"Accessory" added to the Court Record.

Sahwit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Sahwit_Appears.text: {color:lightblue}(All right,{p:150} I think that's everything here.)

Sahwit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Sahwit_Appears.text: {color:lightblue}(Once I've gathered everything I can,{p:150} it's time for court.{nl}That's where I'll bring the truth to light!)
{setState:crime_scene_done,true}{jump:Crime_Scene_Finish}{skip:0}{sectionEnd}
